title: 到底精神病係好似感冒咁會蘊釀一排先爆定話有就有

replies.msg:
去到邊一個點先知一個人有無精神病
蘊釀緊感冒都會喉嚨痛流鼻水 然後狂啪水都可能好返
咁精神病呢?

In accordance with dsm5, common mental disorders such as bipolar disorder, major depression and schizophrenia are diagnosed if their respective signs and symptoms are prolonged for 6 months or longer. So, generally speaking, i mean technically, mental disorders cannot be diagnosed all of a sudden, but of course, undesirable emotions can come to you abruptly.
Try to relax a bit by playing sport or talking to somebody u trust. Pls dont hesitate to seek professional attention when necessary.

quote.msg: In accordance with dsm5, common mental disorders such as bipolar disorder, major depression and schizophrenia are diagnosed if their respective signs and symptoms are prolonged for 6 months or longer. replies.msg: not sure if i am having normal emotional ups and downs or really mentally ill
